actionable_predicate: When you commit code, register that your action rests on a stack you did not author. The Linux kernel, the Python interpreter, the patterns you use, the conventions of review — they are all inherited. The verse names a metaphysical source; the engineering shadow is gratitude that does not flatten into 'open source is sacred'.
